# mixpanel_tag (Data Source)

Fetches a Mixpanel tag by ID.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "mixpanel_tag" "example" {
  project_id = 1234567
  tag_id     = 42
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `project_id` (Number)
- `tag_id` (Number)

### Read-Only

- `id` (Number) The ID of this resource.
- `name` (String)
